category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes ipatool as a command-line tool for searching and downloading ipa files from the iOS App Store.
source_facts.description says it searches and downloads app packages from the iOS App Store.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading uses ipatool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes a Wiki as an official documentation area.
Official repository README is the primary usage surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/majd/ipatool, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes ipa files and command-line usage.
source_facts.description identifies App Store search/download of iOS app packages.
